Container.Name: milvus-etcd
Container.Overview: [b]etcd v3[/b] used as metadata/coordination store for Milvus Standalone. [br] [b]Not a standalone app[/b] — install Garage first, then this, then Milvus. [b]Autostart order:[/b] Garage (1) → etcd (2) → Milvus (3) with ~10s delays. [br] No ports need to be published to the host; Milvus reaches etcd at [i]milvus-etcd:2379[/i] over the [i]milvus-net[/i] network. [br] [b]Data dir MUST be on cache/NVMe[/b] — etcd is sensitive to slow disks and FUSE fsync semantics.
Container.Description: etcd is a distributed reliable key-value store. Milvus Standalone uses it for metadata and leader election.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: etcd data dir. Cache pool only — never /mnt/user.

Config.Name: ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_MODE
Config.Description: Auto-compaction mode (keeps the data dir from growing unbounded).

Config.Name: ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_RETENTION
Config.Description: Keep this many revisions before compacting.

Config.Name: ETCD_QUOTA_BACKEND_BYTES
Config.Description: Backend quota in bytes (4 GiB). Raise if Milvus reports etcd full.
